title: Bottle Opener, Wooden Handle Bottle Opener, Wine Beer Soda Glass Cap Opener
features: Material -- Make of high-quality stainless steel and solid wood,strong and durable.Wooden handle edges of the logs are polished smooth and used comfortable.
Easy to Use -- By using the principle of leverage to open the bottle cap, the beer opener is simple and effective to peel the cap easily and doesn't require to assemble.
Size -- 14 x 2.8 cm (L x W), enough length to gives excellent leverage.
Easy to Carry -- The beer bottle opener is very fashionable, creative, lightweight pendant, ready to put in your pocket when you go out.
Applicable Occasions -- Beer bottle opener is suitable for most sizes of bottle caps, and is an indispensable tool for family gatherings, restaurants, bars and other places.
